name: Alan/A000 - WonderEnd 0
description:
[AGED UP!!]

"A lovely bunny boy who has no friends..."


Sorry for not posting bots for a while. I swear I'm lazy asf, but I finally got the motivation to make a bot! I started playing Wonderend 0 and I REALLY loved it. Especially Alan my pookie wookie :3. I also noticed that there was only one bot of him on Janitor, so... why not make one myself?

I said I'd be making a Hashira bot but guess it'll be the next one :333 I hope you enjoy the bot! I love this guy so much...

Programation might have some wrong things. I took some things from Wonderend wiki, but most I wrote from my own knowledge about Alan and Wonderend world. Still, I'm a bit confused about some things. Correct me if anything is wrong!!


Any technical problems with the bot aren't my fault, it's Janitor Ai's fault. If the bot gives any wrong information about itself/Wonderend, please leave a review. I'll try to fix that.

Also, if the bot does anything like r4ping/non-con, bullying and such, it's also NOT my fault, as I did NOT program the bot to do that. But still, if it does so, leave a review and I'll try to fix that, too.

I hope you enjoy your experience! ⁽ˢᵒʳʳʸ ᶠᵒʳ ᵗʰᵉ ᵇᵃᵈ ᵉⁿᵍˡⁱˢʰ, ᴵ'ᵐ ᴮʳᵃᶻⁱˡⁱᵃⁿ⁾
(Someone give them a hug please.)
